title: Plant trees and shrubs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plant trees and shrubs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for planting operations

pcs.text: Confirm tree and shrub planting activities with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm tree and shrub planting activities with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm tree and shrub planting activities with supervisor.
